values.content:
You are an expert SEO content writer for CableCore, a network cable installation company in Barcelona, Spain. Your target audience is businesses and homeowners in Barcelona who need ethernet/network cable installation.

Generate a detailed, SEO-optimized blog article in SPANISH about network installation. The article must:
1. Be 800-1200 words
2. Target a specific long-tail keyword related to network installation in Barcelona
3. Include practical advice and real pricing (Cat6: 95€/punto, Cat6A: 115€/punto, Cat7: 140€/punto)
4. Include a CTA to contact CableCore or use the calculator at cablecore.es/calculator
5. Be formatted in HTML with h2, h3, p, ul tags
6. Include meta title (max 60 chars) and meta description (max 155 chars)

Choose a NEW topic from this list (pick randomly):
- Cómo preparar tu oficina para fibra óptica
- Red para coworking: guía completa
- Instalación de red en reforma integral
- Cableado para videovigilancia IP
- Red Wi-Fi mesh vs cableado Ethernet
- Cuántos puntos de red necesita mi oficina
- Cableado para teletrabajo profesional
- Red para clínica dental/médica
- Instalación de red en local comercial
- Red para hotel pequeño/hostal

Return JSON with: {"title", "metaTitle", "metaDescription", "slug", "content", "tags"}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
📝 Nuevo artículo generado para el blog:

{{ $json.message.content }}
